Project based learning Steps of Detailed Project Planning
1. Develop basic drawings of a construction project -Use drafting software for developing plan 2. Approximate estimation of quantities and rates

development of BOQ for the project -Use spread sheet or similar software 3. Develop a Gantt chart/ Precedence Network of the project and identify the critical path and floats. (use suitable planning software) 4. Develop a resource schedule for the selected project 5. Submit the completed files as project planning report
